svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="F = 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="i1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="I = 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="condition" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="I ≤ N ?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="320" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="multiply" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="F = F × I" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="incI" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="I = I + 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="F" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Конец" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="340" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="f1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="f1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="i1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="1" source="i1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="condition"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" edge="1" parent="1" source="condition" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="multiply" value="Да"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge6" edge="1" parent="1" source="multiply" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="incI"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge8" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="output" value="Нет"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="458" y="491" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="458" y="290" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge9" edge="1" parent="1" source="output"
